author: cperezz.eth
content:
It says it uses Verkle-IPA.. And that is definitely not in the 2030 roadmap. And there's no reason whatsoever to use it. 

So I'd take this post with humor. An expensive way to throw credits to the bin almost..

Vibehouse on the other side seems a more curated thing. You can take a look to it from <@688748669268132001>
